summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The VistaShares Artificial Intelligence Supercycle ETF (AIS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, using an underlying index to identify and weight global AI companies in an investment portfolio. Companies may span in size, selection is based on thematic relevance and liquidity. AIS was launched on Oct 1, 2024 and is issued by VistaShares.

holdings.infoBox: AIS is an equity ETF with a total of 70 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 7.99%, Micron Technology at 6.54%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.33%, Vertiv Holdings Co at 3.93%, and Silicon Motion Technology at 3.72%.
